title: エリザベス女王杯の後に・横切った声

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I did it...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I actually won. I won... the Queen Elizabeth II
Cup.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I've finally become... a true princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: LET'S GOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess! Kawakami Princess has
claimed first place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess dashes off towards the
winner's circle, her whole visage beaming with
elation.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Eek?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Look—look! I came in first place!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I fulfilled my dream of winning the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, Kawakami! You did it! It was an
amazing race!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Hey! You want to watch where you're going next
time?! You almost knocked over my trainee!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A's Trainer
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'd heard the stories, but I guess she really is a brute! Does she have no dignity as a runner?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sorry...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Over here, Kawakami Princess! That was an
incredible race!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
And now, it's time for an interview with the victor!
Here's Kawakami Princess, who simply dazzled as
she claimed first place!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
So tell us—what emotions did you feel the
moment you won the race and ascended the
queen's throne?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It felt just like a dream, of course! I was super
happy!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: That's why without thinking, I...

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text: Oh, so that Umamusume is this year's queen. The one who came charging wildly into the winner's circle just now...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A's Trainer
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'd heard the stories, but I guess she really is a brute! Does she have no dignity as a runner?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What are you acting all quiet for?

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text: Sweep Tosho?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You should be bouncing around all happy like
you always do! You're not the shy type.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You were gung ho enough during the race at
least...

text_block_list.name: Lady in a Dress
text_block_list.text: Oh, is this year's queen friends with that problem child? Sigh... I guess there was good reason to be worried.

text_block_list.name: Lady with Hat
text_block_list.text:
Did you see how she behaved just after crossing
the finish line? She roared like some kind of
beast. It's as if she doesn't know that this should
be a place of elegance and grace.

text_block_list.name: Lady in a Dress
text_block_list.text:
Honestly... Her name is Princess, but she doesn't
act like one at all—let alone a queen.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (Have I... heard this before?)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(I wanted to become a princess like Princess
Fighter. I've won the Queen Elizabeth II Cup,
but...)

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo! Princess! Smash through the next race,
too! Do your best!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
What's with her? I can't believe it. She's not
princess-like in the slightest.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(If this were a race in Princess Fighter, everyone
would be happy... but...)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hey, where do you think you're going?!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Um... She must be overcome with emotion! What
a breathtakingly intense race it was!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Is this really the princess I aspired to become?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later that night, Kawakami Princess is awfully
reserved despite having fulfilled her long-held
desire to win the Queen Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I-it's nothing! Ohohoho! Now then, let's decide on
our next objective!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We ended up entering today's race almost
immediately after the Shuka Sho. Ideally, I'd like
to give her some chance to rest before we begin
her senior year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A medium-distance G2 race on turf. It takes place
in March, so she should be able to handle it no
matter which G1 race she wants to enter during
the spring season.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...Th-that sounds great! The name makes it sound
very, um, fun. So... when do we get back down to
training?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzz... Bzzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look down at my phone's screen to see the name
of the TV producer we spoke to during the Shuka
Sho.

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
"Sorry to contact you so late! I'd like to have a
serious discussion with you, but I'd prefer to keep
it a secret from Kawakami Princess..."

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
"She's not... standing right next to you at the
moment, is she? In that case, I'm terribly sorry,
but..."

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh, d-don't mind me! I'll just wait right here!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: It's fine! Don't worry about it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle...

text_block_list.name: Princess Fighter Character A
text_block_list.text:
"That was amazing, Princess! You're everyone's
hope—a true legendary warrior!"

text_block_list.name: Lady in a Dress
text_block_list.text:
Honestly... Her name is Princess, but she doesn't
act like one at all—let alone a queen.

text_block_list.name: Princess Fighter Character B
text_block_list.text:
"Look at how beautifully Princess Fighter moves!
Who wouldn't be charmed by her elegance?"

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A's Trainer
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'd heard the stories, but I guess she really is a brute! Does she have no dignity as a runner?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No! No! No! I need to snap myself out of this funk!
I just need to be more careful next time...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Arrgh! Hmph! Yaaah! Hah! Hup!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: HIIIYAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thump! Rattle! Craaash! Flutter!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Uwah?! Ack, did I hit that box?! All the
documents are—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh no... I have to tidy all this up before Trainer
gets back...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? This is...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, Trainer! ...Oh? Why do you look so
flustered?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Come ooon, you should know that a princess is
very perceptive! I'll have to pretend I didn't see
anything. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You actually prepared a surprise present for when
I win the Queen Elizabeth II Cup. ♪ That's my
trainer—so considerate. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This is... the surprise present Trainer was hiding
from me before.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Glances around nervously...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Trainer... but I could really use this
pick-me-up right now.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
When the big reveal happens, I'll just act
surprised like I never saw it before.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...Letters? And they're addressed to both Trainer
and me. There are so many—even more than the
fan letters I get.
